bugs.error_message: TUI Agents table shows Cursor CLI Ver as '3.7.12' (GUI version) instead of '2026.06.04-5fd875e' (CLI version)
bugs.root_cause: get_cursor_cli_version() fell back to `cursor --version` which returns the GUI version, not the CLI version. `cursor-agent --version` is the correct CLI binary.
bugs.fix: Removed the `cursor --version` fallback entirely. Now only uses `cursor-agent --version`. Returns None if not found.

bugs.error_message: thread 'main' panicked at src/tui/mod.rs:971:27: start byte index 123 is not a char boundary; it is inside '包' (bytes 121..124 of string)
bugs.root_cause: shorten_path() used byte-level string slicing (&path[path.len() - 28..]) which panics when the slice boundary falls inside a multi-byte UTF-8 character (Chinese chars are 3 bytes each).
bugs.fix: Changed both shorten_path() and truncate_id() to use char-based operations: chars().skip(n).collect::<String>() instead of byte indexing.

bugs.error_message: TUI crashes when switching tabs after agent list changes (e.g., Codex tab crash)
bugs.root_cause: After refresh() updates self.agents, active_tab could exceed the new tab count if installed agents changed. The Tabs widget panics when .select(index) >= tab count.
bugs.fix: Added active_tab clamping in both refresh() (after agents update) and draw() (before rendering). Belt-and-suspenders approach.

bugs.error_message: Proxy/VPN tab added to GUI but missing from TUI
bugs.root_cause: Forgot to add the Proxy/VPN tab to the TUI when implementing the GUI version. User expected both interfaces to stay in sync.
bugs.fix: Added draw_proxy_tab() with sub-sections: system proxy, VPN connections, proxy client, proxy nodes. Registered in tab routing between agent tabs and Keep-Alive.

bugs.error_message: TUI: cannot reach the last tab (Keep-Alive) using the Tab/arrow keys
bugs.root_cause: App::tab_count() returned `1 + installed_agents().len() + 1`, omitting the Proxy/VPN tab, while tab_names() built `[Dashboard, ...agents, Proxy/VPN, Keep-Alive]`. next_tab()/prev_tab() cycle modulo tab_count(), so the real last index (Keep-Alive) was unreachable. The draw path used tab_names().len(), so the two counts had drifted out of sync.
bugs.fix: Made tab_count() return self.tab_names().len() — single source of truth, so the navigable tab count always matches the rendered tabs.

bugs.error_message: TUI starts slowly and is laggy when switching tabs with Tab
bugs.root_cause: App::new() ran a full data collection and then app.refresh() ran it AGAIN before the first frame. The full refresh() ran every 3s tick inline (blocking the event loop, so key presses queued during a tick were delayed seconds). It always probed proxy (proxy::get_proxy_info: ~6 networksetup/scutil subprocess spawns + 7 localhost HTTP probes each creating its own tokio runtime + up to 16 pgrep spawns) and loaded every agent's sessions/5h-usage/1w-usage/rich-usage regardless of the active tab. agent_usage_1w was fetched on every tick but never rendered. system::get_system_status() used System::new_all() (enumerates all processes twice) for data that only needs CPU+RAM.
bugs.fix: Lazy-load per tab: Dashboard data at startup; Proxy and per-agent detail loaded only when their tab is first viewed (cached via proxy: Option + agent_detail_loaded flags). Periodic tick_refresh() now refreshes only system stats + the active tab's data. Removed the redundant startup refresh and the never-rendered agent_usage_1w fetch. Slimmed get_system_status() to System::new() + refresh_cpu_usage()/refresh_memory() instead of new_all()+refresh_all() twice.

bugs.error_message: Claude session ID and start time always blank; usage total_sessions always 1
bugs.root_cause: Structs used snake_case (session_id, started_at) but real ~/.claude files use camelCase (sessionId, startedAt); serde(default) masked it so fields silently defaulted empty.
bugs.fix: Added serde(rename_all=camelCase) to ClaudeSession+HistoryEntry; tests use real fixtures. Verified sessions show real id+started_at.

bugs.error_message: Codex tokens over-counted 2-3x; window filter ignored; interactions=token sum
bugs.root_cause: total_token_usage is cumulative per session but code summed across all token_count events ([24481,49695,76369,104787]->255332 vs 104787). get_usage compared INTEGER updated_at vs date STRING (SQLite affinity coerced to 2026, filter no-op). total_interactions=SUM(tokens_used). rate limits from last file in dir order. Codex.app hardcoded /Applications but at ~/Apps.
bugs.fix: Per-file LAST cumulative (mtime-cached); integer epoch window; interactions=thread count; rate limits from newest-mtime file w/ resets_at; codex_app_candidates checks /Applications+~/Applications+~/Apps. Verified 5h=3 vs 1m=46; GUI 26.602.40724.

bugs.error_message: Cursor sessions tab always empty; fabricated '1 active conversation'
bugs.root_cause: Queried source/timestamp from conversation_summaries, but real cols are conversationId,title,model,mode,updatedAt (no source/timestamp). prepare failed -> empty sessions; count -> unwrap_or(1) -> always 1.
bugs.fix: Query conversationId,model,mode,updatedAt; window on updatedAt; return 0 on failure.

bugs.error_message: codex pgrep false positives; keepalive could kill recycled PID; network no timeout
bugs.root_cause: pgrep -f codex matched any process with codex in cmdline/env. keepalive killed stored PID without verifying caffeinate (PID reuse). network had no timeout.
bugs.fix: pgrep -x codex; is_caffeinate(pid) ps -o comm= guard; reqwest 5s timeout; doc fix ipinfo.io.

bugs.root_cause: Used "!=" instead of ">="
bugs.fix: Changed operator != → >=

bugs.root_cause: 9 lines replaced/restructured
bugs.fix: Rewrote 23→46 lines (9 removed)

bugs.error_message: Claude/Codex CLI versions incorrect in TUI
bugs.root_cause: Claude preferred ~/.local/bin/claude (symlink to OLDER 2.1.139) over real claude on PATH+session (2.1.156). Codex read version.json latest_version (update-checker 0.129.0) not installed 0.130.0.
bugs.fix: Claude: prefer running CLI session version, then PATH claude -v, then ~/.local/bin. Codex: prefer `codex --version`, version.json fallback. Verified 2.1.156 / 0.130.0.

bugs.error_message: Cursor & Claude GUI versions empty though apps installed/running
bugs.root_cause: GUI version read hardcoded /Applications, but Cursor.app at ~/Apps (3.7.12). Claude had no desktop detection; /Applications/Claude.app (1.11187.1) never read.
bugs.fix: cursor_app_candidates/claude_app_candidates check /Applications+~/Applications+~/Apps; get_claude_desktop_version added; Claude gui falls back to desktop app. Verified 3.7.12 / 1.11187.1.

bugs.error_message: Codex dashboard shows '111 active (13 CLI, 98 GUI)' — session count massively overcounted
bugs.root_cause: count_sessions_by_mode counted ALL non-archived threads (lifetime history), not active ones. The intended live-process path (get_live_pids/chat_processes.json) was dead: it deserialized field 'pid' but the JSON uses 'osPid' (often null/stale), so it always returned empty.
bugs.fix: Replaced with count_active_sessions(): threads updated in last 15 min, split by source (cli/sdk-cli vs gui). Removed dead get_live_pids/ProcessEntry/process_manager_path. running = pgrep -x codex OR active>0. Status text shows 'Running (idle)' for running-but-0-active. Verified: 111 -> Running (idle).
